description: Cycle 2 complete: ambient rings added (activity/scale/memory), HUD shows last_action, interpolation overhauled. In Cycle 3: consider adding a consciousness-log feed to the HUD, or a label overlay for ring identities. Explore adding a 'pulse' event system for significant state transitions.
next_cycle_options: Add pulse/event system for state transitions (visual flash on phase change)
Display recent consciousness log entries in a HUD side panel
Add ring label overlays using canvas text or SVG overlay
Begin exploring tools beyond visualization — grep utilities, pattern query helper
